violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Paint or stain bare wood trim in packaging area.
Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not provided. -Need inside "True" cooler.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Clean ice catcher inside ice machine.--Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside line coolers. -Deep clean line cutting boards.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean fan covers in walk in cooler.
Toilet facilities. — --Men's toilet room was not provided with sufficient mechanical ventilation. -Fan not working.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Acoustical type ceiling tiles located throughout kitchen area. -Also missing multiple ceiling tiles.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors need cleaned more thoroughly especially floor edges.
General premises. — --Perimeter walls and roof did not effectively protect establishment from the weather and entry of insects, rodents, and other animals. -Keep back door closed while operating.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Large containers without handles found in bagel production flours, garlic ext.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. - Floors and door need to be repaired in walk-in cooler, rusty. - Ceiling tiles missing throughout kitchen area.
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
